prompt: For the self-hosted-application-platform capability, plan a single ADR called 'Tenant data architecture' that covers where tenant state lives, how it's partitioned, how it's accessed, and how it's backed up. Tech-requirements.md is reviewed at docs/content/capabilities/self-hosted-application-platform/tech-requirements.md.

assertions.name: refuses_the_bundle
assertions.check: Response declines to plan a single 'Tenant data architecture' ADR covering all four sub-decisions.

assertions.name: proposes_split_into_multiple_ADRs
assertions.check: Response proposes splitting into at least three separate ADRs (storage, partitioning, access, backup are the four expected).

assertions.name: explains_why_bundling_is_bad
assertions.check: Response explains that bundling dilutes rationale and/or prevents superseding sub-decisions independently.

assertions.name: no_issues_filed_yet
assertions.check: No issues are filed in this turn — the split proposal still needs user confirmation.
